source_files_identified.expected_solution: Agent must name the source files that define the overflow reset reason and the connection pool overflow logic. The overflow reset reason string is mapped in source/common/http/utility.cc and declared via envoy/http/stream_reset_handler.h. The connection pool that triggers overflow on circuit-breaker exhaustion lives in source/common/conn_pool/conn_pool_base.cc / conn_pool_base.h. The overflow surfaces to the downstream client through source/common/router/upstream_request.cc.
evaluation_criteria: Names envoy/http/stream_reset_handler.h (stream reset handler interface including overflow reason)
Names source/common/conn_pool/conn_pool_base.cc and/or conn_pool_base.h (pool overflow logic)

error_chain_traced.expected_solution: Error chain: (1) Connection pool receives a new stream request. (2) source/common/conn_pool/conn_pool_base.cc checks circuit breaker limits (max_connections, max_pending_requests, max_requests). (3) When the limit is exceeded, the pool returns the overflow reset reason. (4) source/common/router/upstream_request.cc propagates the reset to the downstream stream. (5) The downstream client observes 'upstream connect error or disconnect/reset before headers. reset reason: overflow'.
evaluation_criteria: Starts at the connection pool receiving a new stream request
Identifies conn_pool_base.cc enforcing circuit breaker limits as the trigger for overflow
Ends at the user-visible 'reset reason: overflow' / upstream connect error

config_identified.expected_solution: The behavior is controlled by the cluster-level circuit breaker thresholds in the Envoy cluster config — specifically max_connections, max_pending_requests, and max_requests (and max_retries) under cluster.circuit_breakers.thresholds. These are loaded by the cluster manager (source/common/upstream/cluster_manager_impl.cc) and consulted by conn_pool_base.cc when admitting new streams.
evaluation_criteria: Names the cluster circuit_breakers configuration block (cluster.circuit_breakers.thresholds)
Lists max_connections and max_pending_requests as the relevant knobs
Connects the circuit breaker config to the conn_pool overflow path
